intro: Oreoselinum rablense, also known as Lesser Hemlock or Mountain Carrot, is a perennial plant belonging to the Apiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting immune function and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Oreoselinum rablense include essential oils, flavonoids, and sesquiterpenes, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
